description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Dated: Monday, 14 Tammuz 1454 Seleucid = 28 June 1143 CE. Location: Minyat Zifta. Husband: Yakhin b. ʿUlla ha-Zaqen ha-Kohen. Wife: Rūma bt. Ḥasān. Written and signed by the judge Shabbetay b. Avraham he-Ḥaver. Also signed by Yeshuʿa b. Shemuel ha-Melammed. The attestation on verso that she received the get is signed by Yosef b. Shemarya and Saʿadya b. Natan. There are three vertical cuts.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בJRL.
